summary: Frontend-only testing for Nexus Panel v1.4 four new features. All acceptance criteria pass: login works; Project Detail Overview has webhook-activity-panel and container-health-panel side-by-side (y=861 for both, x=288 vs x=1096) with Configuration Summary below and Edit Configuration button that switches to the Configuration tab; Environment tab exists with cfg-env textarea + Apply Standard Env / Generate JWT Secret / Scan Required Vars / Save Environment buttons; Generate JWT Secret adds JWT_SECRET= line; Save Environment persists (toast: 'Configuration saved'); cfg-env is NOT present in the Configuration tab anymore; save-config-btn still saves without error; Terminal font stepper (10-22) and theme selector (default/dracula/solarized) work live, persist in localStorage nexus-term-theme / nexus-term-font, and survive reload; no deploying-bar shown (expected — only TEST_uienv project is in Failed state); zero console errors across Dashboard/Projects/ProjectDetail/Terminal/Settings/Activity. Terminal theme/font reset to defaults at the end.
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectDetail.jsx is ~1200 lines; consider splitting into smaller sub-components (Overview panels, Config, Environment, History) for maintainability.
In persistEnv/save the entire form (including github_token) is PUT on every env save — fine as long as backend treats absent github_token as no-op (it does).
Toast queue after Save Environment shows previous 'Configuration saved' toast still visible from earlier save-config click; that is sonner behavior — not a bug.
seed_data_creation: None. Existing TEST_uienv project (Failed status) used for Project Detail testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only one project exists (TEST_uienv, Failed). Docker unavailable so container health empty and no deploying-bar renders — that is expected. Terminal theme/font were reset to default/13 at the end of the run.
